name: feishu-ceo-agent-chat-sync

checklist.summary: 用户回复“可以出 todolist 了”，视为确认当前 checklist 并继续生成 todolist。

tested.summary: 用户已在本地 http://localhost:8090/ 完成飞书聊天通道验收，并确认“这个需求我验收过了”。

done.summary: 用户确认需求已验收并要求 push；需求闭环完成，归档到 archive。

notes: Product clarification completed before archival.
Checklist drafted and waiting for user confirmation before creating todolist.
Updated VO-side scope to reuse existing chat with a CEO marker and add CEO agent assignment in settings, instead of creating a separate CEO private-chat panel.
Simplified assignment-change scope: old CEO-marked conversations require no special handling; the main goal is selecting one VO agent to represent VO in Feishu private chat.
Updated technical scope to reuse the existing message module and add Feishu channel input/output adapters instead of a separate CEO messaging path.
Restricted Feishu channel input/output to long connection only for the first version.
Made VO-side recording mandatory for all Feishu-channel inbound and outbound messages; no recordMessages off switch.
Separated Feishu configuration into existing notification app and new chat app; this requirement uses the chat app long connection.
Checklist confirmed by user request to create todolist.
Todolist created after checklist confirmation.
Implementation completed for dual Feishu app config, chat app long connection adapter, existing message pipeline dispatch, mandatory VO records, idempotency, and focused tests.
Waiting for user confirmation of tested status and final done before archiving.
Added Feishu chat bindings API and missing chat-app credential guard; updated focused tests and checklist evidence.
Focused Feishu channel, Feishu sync, syntax, self-executing meeting request, and Project Execution Feishu regression checks pass.
Full pytest baseline excluding workflow e2e currently has unrelated failures outside this Feishu chat requirement, so final tested/done confirmation remains pending.
Added main settings UI for Feishu chat bindings so bound/unbound user acceptance can be configured without editing config files.
Added empty-text Feishu message guard and focused test; Feishu channel ignores empty text without dispatching an Agent or sending a reply.
Added HTTP route-level coverage for /api/feishu-chat/bindings POST/GET persistence and readback.
Added source metadata persistence for existing provider history/comm events and verified Feishu metadata in Hermes history.
Added direct Feishu long-connection message handler callback coverage while keeping SDK registration path unchanged.
Added route-level inbound-test coverage proving simulated Feishu private-chat payloads traverse HTTP handler, binding lookup, representative dispatch, reply send adapter, and VO channel records.
Feishu success replies now include CEO role and representative Agent display text while preserving raw reply plus feishuReply in VO records.
Added manual-acceptance.md with real Feishu chat app long-connection end-to-end acceptance steps and failure triage.
Added representative Agent switch coverage proving future Feishu messages use the new representativeAgentId without migrating old records.
Added unavailable representative Agent coverage proving safe agent_failed behavior, Feishu failure reply, and VO failure record.
Added unsupported chat type/message type coverage proving group and non-text events are ignored without dispatch or reply.
Added mandatory recording coverage proving recordMessages=false-like config cannot disable Feishu channel VO records.
Added missing/invalid representative Agent coverage for config save and inbound handling without dispatch.
Added consecutive message ordering coverage proving stable conversationId and ordered VO channel records for rapid Feishu messages.
Added direct Feishu text sender coverage for chat app credential flow, /im/v1/messages text payload, and secret redaction.
Added acceptance-audit.md mapping CHK-001 through CHK-022 to current evidence and remaining real Feishu end-to-end gates.
Added read-only /api/feishu-chat/records route and test to support VO-side acceptance inspection of Feishu channel records.

Blocked from final tested/done closure because CHK-022 requires real Feishu chat app credentials, long-connection event delivery, and Feishu client reply evidence; current environment has no VO_FEISHU_CHAT_APP_ID/VO_FEISHU_CHAT_APP_SECRET.
User completed local Feishu chat acceptance on 2026-07-05 and confirmed the requirement is accepted.
Requirement marked done and archived after final user confirmation.
